evidence: drsam-99657.bubble — CustomEvent bTICV (14 TerminateWorkflow actions independently verified)

critiques.finding: File header and decompose scope reference custom event pointer name bTICa while the Bubble entity id is bTICV; implementers grepping bTICa would miss the workflow.
critiques.alternative: Standardize comments and decompose prose on entity id bTICV (event_name calculate_behavioral_fingerprint) to match ir_refs.

critiques.finding: Unit tests cover resolveBehavioralFingerprint exhaustively (14 cases) but calculateUserBehavioralFingerprint has no test for behavioralPatterns field extraction or patchOnboardingAndResults side-effect.
critiques.alternative: Add calculateUserBehavioralFingerprint.test.ts with mocked loadProfileRow/patchOnboardingAndResults verifying field read and behavioral_fingerprint_text patch payload.

critiques.finding: Prototype stores behavioral_fingerprint_text in profiles.onboarding_data rather than a dedicated user column; consistent with sibling API calculators but differs from Bubble bTIDk ChangeThing on user.behavioral_fingerprint_text.
critiques.alternative: Document the onboarding_data mapping in profileFieldPatch or add a profiles-column migration when backend schema is in scope.
